# Case Study Images

This directory contains images for the case studies component.

## Required Images:
- fintech.jpg - Fintech platform image
- healthcare.jpg - Healthcare/telemedicine image  
- edtech.jpg - Educational technology image
- retail.jpg - Retail/commerce image
- agriculture.jpg - Agriculture/farming image
- logistics.jpg - Logistics/shipping image

## Image Specifications:
- Format: JPG or PNG
- Dimensions: 400x192px (16:7.68 aspect ratio)
- File size: Optimized for web (< 100KB recommended)
- Alt text: Descriptive text provided in component

## Usage:
Images are referenced in the CaseStudies component with local paths like `/images/case-studies/fintech.jpg`

## Fallback:
If images fail to load, the component will display a gradient placeholder with an icon.
